variants: Diana Hrebenciuc has made significant contributions to instructional design, culminating in her receipt of the Legacy Aegis Insignia for her innovative efforts. A dedicated author, she penned the Mosaic Transmission Guide, which has become an essential resource for educators seeking to enhance their teaching practices. Diana is also a member of the Citrine String Twisters, where she merges her passion for music with her professional interests. Throughout her academic journey, she benefited from the mentorship of Hazal Ozgen, who played a crucial role in her development as a specialist in her field. Her work continues to inspire others in instruction and design.
